summary: Architected and led an AI-powered testing platform (Python · AWS Bedrock · AgentCore) that cut QA for new state launches ~90% (3 months → 1 week) across 3,000+ games, then rolled it out as a Platform-as-a-Service across Flutter Entertainment. Owned 3rd-party game-provider integration across MERN microservices on K8s/AWS and drove ADRs that lifted user retention up to 75% and cut service timeouts 99%.

Built enterprise front-ends on Adobe Experience Manager for financial, automotive and healthcare clients. Cut build time 50% and bundle size 30% (Webpack → Vite), reduced new-developer onboarding from 3 weeks to 1 via ITCSS/BEM, and delivered WCAG AA across 26 Swiss locales on a 1.5M-page banking site.

Full-service freelance practice for EU clients across MERN, Python, AWS and DevOps — positioned as the GDPR-compliant alternative. Replaced SaaS automation (Make/Zapier) with self-hosted n8n to remove data-sovereignty risk, built privacy-safe analytics pipelines, and shipped end-to-end marketing-attribution systems.
